title: myrrhinium octandrum
intro: Myrrhinium octandrum, also known as sweet goldenrod, is a perennial plant native to South Africa and is characterized by its golden yellow flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Myrrhinium octandrum include reducing fever, relieving coughs and colds, and soothing digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
